title: Towngas and Sinopec Subsidiaries Partner to Advance Hydrogen and Green Fuel in Hong Kong
content: Towngas, Sinopec (Hong Kong), and Sinopec Star have signed a memorandum of understanding to establish a strategic partnership aimed at accelerating Hong Kong's energy transition. The collaboration focuses on developing hydrogen, green methanol, and Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) ecosystems. Towngas leverages its extensive gas network and annual production capacity of over 12,000 tonnes, including biogas-to-hydrogen initiatives. Sinopec (Hong Kong) contributes its vast retail and distribution infrastructure, while Sinopec Star brings expertise in renewable energy and liquid hydrogen technologies. The partners plan to explore joint ventures for hydrogen refueling stations, green methanol shipping applications, and SAF development. This alliance supports China's "dual carbon" strategy and Hong Kong's 2050 carbon neutrality vision by commercializing clean fuel solutions for the transport, maritime, and aviation sectors.
author: Analysts Account
